item.title: Warsh to meet Tillis as Senate confirmation remains blocked
item.description: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., has refused to advance Warsh's confirmation until a probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell is dropped.

item.title: China’s nudge, U.S. waiver and Iran tensions test India’s economic balancing act
item.description: India is trying to preserve its long-standing neutral foreign policy as escalating tensions around Iran threaten its oil supply and expose New Delhi t...

item.title: Oil tankers transiting Strait of Hormuz 'must be very careful,' Iran Foreign Ministry warns
item.description: The price of crude oil has sharply spiked as the Strait of Hormuz has been effectively closed as the United States and Israel wage war on Iran.

item.title: Trump says Iran war will end 'very soon,' predicts lower oil prices
item.description: U.S. stock market indexes rose earlier in the day after an initial report that President Donald Trump said he believed the Iran war was largely finish...

item.title: Democrats threaten more Iran war powers votes, call for Hegseth, Rubio to testify
item.description: Democrats are vowing to interrupt normal order in the Senate unless Pete Hegseth and Marco Rubio testify publicly.
